MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: M. Smith; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Joe Siino is present.
Attorney Marc Russell Seidenfeld appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Megan Goodwin is present.
Attorney Stephen B. McDonagh representing the defendant through full scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Barbara Anscher, litigants and counsel meet and confer in Dept. 504B, for settlement discussions.

This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed.
The trial date of JAN-30-2012 is vacated.
